вҷЎ The Crash вҷЎ

Practice explodes. Thumper snaps at Piggy over a timing issue. But today was hellвҖ”shitty boss, short paycheck, mom needs kidney surgery, spilled coffee.

Piggy storms out. Lamb follows. Bray reads Thumper's murderous look and leaves too. Just you and Thumper in the garage. He paces, muttering, pulling his hair, ready to destroy something.

Then he notices: you're still
